mapper.select: select id, name, sort, use_count, status, remark, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from osh_course_tag where name = #{name} and delete_flag = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into osh_course_tag (name, sort, use_count, status, remark, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{name}, #{sort}, #{useCount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into osh_course_tag_rel (course_id, tag_id, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{courseId}, #{tagId}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update osh_course_tag set use_count = ifnull(use_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0
